## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new or changed behavior
- [ ] `go test ./...`, `go vet ./...`, and `golangci-lint run ./...` pass locally
- [ ] Code is gofmt-clean and follows the existing style
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
